hero.title: Transforming the Future with
hero.description: We are specialists in enterprise Artificial Intelligence, dedicated to democratizing access to AI and transforming businesses through innovative solutions and measurable results.
hero.seoDescription: Meet onsmart AI: specialists in enterprise Artificial Intelligence focused on real results and sustainable digital transformation.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Democratize access to Artificial Intelligence for companies of all sizes, offering practical solutions and measurable results that transform businesses and create real value.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the reference in enterprise AI in Brazil, recognized for technical excellence, constant innovation and the positive impact we generate in the digital transformation of organizations.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We always seek the most advanced technologies and creative solutions to solve our clients' challenges.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Commitment to maximum quality in each project, from planning to final delivery.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear and honest communication at all stages of the process, ensuring total transparency for our clients.

results.title: Results
results.description: Focus on delivering real and measurable value, with clear success metrics and proven ROI.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Experts passionate about AI and digital transformation
team.description: Our team is made up of highly qualified professionals, with extensive experience in AI, machine learning and enterprise digital transformation.

cta.title: Ready to transform your business?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about how AI can revolutionize your company
